summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI Policy Copilot authentication and audit trail functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission through UI doesn't create user accounts - registration appears successful but auth system doesn't persist user data from web form
Initial login attempts fail with 'Invalid email or password' even with correct credentials, requires page reload to work properly
Streamlit session state is not persistent - users get logged out when navigating or page refreshes

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with all form elements
User registration backend authentication system works
Main chat interface displays after successful login
PDF upload and document indexing functionality works
Policy questions generate AI responses with source citations
Audit trail page displays user activities correctly
Sign out functionality returns to login page
User card displays correct name, email and department
Sidebar navigation elements are present and functional
Dark theme and premium styling render properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Streamlit form submission issue in registration flow - backend auth works but web form doesn't persist user data. Also improve session state management to prevent unexpected logouts during navigation.
